codeReview.summary: TTS settings frontend implementation is complete. Voice Output section added to Settings page with voice dropdown (6 voices), rate slider (-50% to +100%), and pitch slider (-50Hz to +50Hz). Settings persist via PUT /api/settings and load on mount via GET /api/settings.

summary: Frontend TTS settings verified: voice dropdown shows 6 curated voices, sliders have correct ranges, settings load on mount and save on change. Success toasts shown on each change.
